response.justification: Bogdan Szabo's resume demonstrates strong software engineering experience, particularly in web and distributed systems, but lacks direct experience with hardware-software co-design, SoC/IP modeling, or performance optimization for AI accelerators—core requirements for this role. His background in general software development, AI-agent infrastructure, and embedded systems does not align closely enough with the specialized needs of cloud infrastructure and hardware optimization for AI accelerators.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, distributed systems)
Expertise in performance optimization for low-latency applications (e.g., DLang experience at Dunnhumby)
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling or hardware-software co-design
Lacks background in deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
Educational background (Bachelor's in CS + Fine Arts) does not meet the required qualifications (PhD/Master's with specialization in relevant engineering/CS field)
